name: Spicy Spam Kabobs
recipeIngredient: 1 can Pineapple chunks packed in-light juice, drained (8 oz)
1 can SPAM Luncheon Meat, cut into 24 cubes (12 oz)
1 Red bell pepper, cut into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first seven ingredients in a 9x12-inch dish.
2. Wrap pea pods around pineapple chunks.
3. Alternately thread SPAM cubes, pineapple chunks, and bell pepper pieces on eight skewers.
4. Place the skewers in the dish with the marinade.
5. Cover and marinate for 2 hours, turning occasionally.
6. Grill the kabobs over medium-hot coals for 10 minutes, turning occasionally.
- Or, broil 5 inches from the heat source for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally.
7. Serve with hot cooked rice.
